title: LOCAL_REALITY_REBASE_AFTER_FOUNDATION_REPAIR

pressure_assessment.reason: Local reality rebase after foundation repair; read-only but broad-scope mapping.

untracked_categories: backend/app/* untracked modules (asset, audit, foundation, gateway, memory, m*)
workspace_baseline.note: Dirty files are all report artifacts and new modules, not tracked production modifications

old_mainline_revalidation.r119_detail: executorReadinessGate at m11/adapters/executor_adapter.ts:241 — not_ready returns action:skip for CLAUDE_CODE, triggering fallback chain
old_mainline_revalidation.r123_detail: inferSystemType at m01/dag_planner.ts:240 — keyword-based routing to VISUAL_WEB/DESKTOP_APP/CLAUDE_CODE/SEARCH/WORKFLOW/TASK
old_mainline_revalidation.r126_detail: orchestrator.ts:208-218 healthCheck() probes /health then createThread() fallback; :231-233 explicit timeout fallback to local
old_mainline_revalidation.r120_detail: M04 TypeScript coordinator does not call Python; Python only enters via DeerFlow HTTP path when deerflowEnabled=true
old_mainline_revalidation.r127_detail: services.py:start_run → asyncio.create_task(run_agent(...)) → worker.py:run_agent → agent.astream() at line 236

auth_gateway.detail: AUTH_MIDDLEWARE_ENABLED/AUTH_ROUTES_ENABLED both false; app.py auth wiring uses try/except non-fatal; TS orchestrator never routes to auth paths

persistence.detail: tmp SQLite only; production DB blocked; TypeScript side uses in-memory; no impact on TS main chain

credential_bootstrap.detail: bootstrap chain verified for auth-disabled mode; irrelevant to TS orchestration path

deps_langgraph_runtime.detail: deps.py:langgraph_runtime initializes checkpointer/store/event_store; all deps are in place for Python gateway to function when activated

m11_visual_automation.detail: TypeScript m11/adapters/executor_adapter.ts unchanged by R241; executeWithAutoSelect still present and healthy

mcp_tools.detail: mcp.py router present; mcp/client.py, mcp/tools.py present; MCP server health unprobed in runtime

pr_ci_side_effects.detail: 255 lint baseline errors and auth_middleware.py:85 SyntaxError are baseline; not main chain blockers

confirmed_edges: M01.orchestrator.ts:208-218 DeerFlow health probe + business probe
unknown_edges: resolve_agent_factory() in start_run — which agent graph is used?
MCP tool registration in LangGraph agent — does it work?
Tool-call event observability — are events actually captured?
Model availability probe — does the LLM actually respond?
